Co,Crcy,Flex1,PK,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Txt,PC,CC,TP,Contract,TTY,ProdCode
Co,Crcy,Flex1,PK,GL,GL Desc,Doc Amt,LC Amt,LC2 Amt,LC3 Amt,Txt,PC,CC,TP,Contract,TTY,ProdCode

y
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0 or Amt3 = 0 or Amt4 = 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, Crcy,CC,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID,Co, GL, Crcy, CC, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3,round(sum(coalesce(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co, GL, Crcy,CC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Crcy,Co,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4) (select KeyID + '-data2',GL,Crcy,Co,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Crcy,Co,CC,Contract,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4) (select KeyID,GL,Crcy,'2008' as Co,'1USU000003' as CC,'1USU000002' as Contract,-Amt1,-Amt2,-Amt3,-Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,Co,PC,TP) (Select KeyID, '1999901' as GL, Crcy, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3,round(sum(Amt4),2) as Amt4, '2008' as Co,'1400000000' as PC, '3080' as TP from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co is NULL group by KeyID, Crcy)
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Crcy,Co,CC,Amt1) (select KeyID,GL,'USD' as Crcy,'3080' as Co,'3GSA100004' as CC,Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Crcy,Amt1,Co,PC,TP) (Select KeyID, '2899901' as GL, 'USD' as Crcy, round(sum(-Amt3),2) as Amt1, '3080' as Co,'3990000000' as PC, '2008' as TP from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co is NULL group by KeyID, Crcy)
update TransX set GL = '6115012' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3080' and GL in ('6115005','6115010','6115011')
update TransX set GL = '6115013' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3080' and GL in ('6110000','6110004')
update TransX set GL = '6116000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3080' and GL in ('6115002','6115003')
update TransX set GL = '6314000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3080' and GL in ('6314005')
Update x set x.GL = y.Field1 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on x.GL = y.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'Reimburse' and ID = 'GL'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, Crcy,PC,CC,TP,Contract,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID,Co, GL, Crcy, PC,CC,TP,Contract, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3,round(sum(coalesce(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, '1' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL group by KeyID,Co, GL, Crcy,PC,CC, TP, Contract)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3080' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set Amt2 = NULL, Amt3 = NULL, Amt4 = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co ='3080'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Contract, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Contract, TP, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, (case when Amt4 > 0 then Amt4 else 0 end) as Amt4, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1' and Co = '2008')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Contract, TP,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Contract, TP, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, (case when Amt4 < 0 then Amt4 else 0 end) as Amt4, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1' and Co = '2008')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1' and Co = '2008'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0
update TransX set PK = '40' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co ='3080' and Amt1 > 0
update TransX set PK = '50' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co ='3080' and Amt1 < 0
update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'NL UW Exec Chargeback for [Yr]/[Mo]' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set ProdCode = 'CHGBACK' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '6%'
